title: CNBC Daily Open: Talking in circles on Iran
summary_full: Iran insists no talks with the U.S. are underway, while G7 foreign ministers gather to discuss de-escalation, sending more mixed signals to the markets.
summary_public: Iran insists no talks with the U.S. are underway, while G7 foreign ministers gather to discuss de-escalation, sending more mixed signals to the markets.
